footer.title: A personal digital world organized around identity, work, records, and technical craft.
footer.description: Built with React, TypeScript, CSS Modules, nfx-ui@0.8.0, i18next, GSAP, and a typed mock API layer.
footer.signalTitle: A world system that changes tone through motion, not just color.
footer.signalDescription: Each route shifts its atmosphere, its transition glyph, and its spatial rhythm while staying inside one coherent Lyu World.
